---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea to improve DataForge CLI.
title: "[FEATURE]: "
labels: enhancement
---

# ✨ Feature Request

Thank you for taking the time to share your idea.

DataForge CLI is built around a simple philosophy:

> **Local-first. Fast. Professional.**

Every feature proposal is carefully reviewed to ensure it aligns with the long-term vision of the project.

---

## 💡 Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

Please describe the current limitation or pain point.

---

## 🚀 Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution.

How should this feature work?

---

## 🔄 Possible Alternatives

Have you considered another approach?

If so, describe it here.

---

## 🌍 Who Would Benefit?

Who would benefit from this feature?

- Yourself
- Most developers
- Enterprise teams
- Open Source projects
- Other (please specify)

---

## 📸 Mockups or Examples

If applicable, include screenshots, diagrams, links or examples that help explain your idea.

---

## 📝 Additional Context

Anything else you'd like us to know?

---

## ❤️ Thank You

Every suggestion helps shape the future of **DataForge CLI**.

Even if a feature isn't implemented, your feedback helps us better understand what developers need.

— **RGS Labs™**
